# PII Allowlist for CI Classification Scan
# Patterns listed here are excluded from PII detection results.
# One pattern per line. Lines starting with # are comments.

# Example/test email domains
example.com
example@example.com
test@test.com
user@example.com
admin@example.com
noreply@example.com
compliance@your-org.example.com
compliance-officer@org.example.com
noreply@anthropic.com

# Fictional phone numbers (RFC 3261 / NANPA 555-01xx range)
555-0100
555-0101
555-0102
555-0103
555-0104
555-0105
555-0106
555-0107

555-0124
555-0125

555-0128

555-0134

# Test SSN

# Test/placeholder patterns commonly in source code
